text: H Donuts the guiltiest of guilty
pleasures but where did the dut get its
shape and more specifically who put the
hole in the dut two competing theories
set the stage for what would become
known as a great dut
debate if you think of the
quintessential American sweet snack it
is in fact the donut that's Michael
kondle he wrote this book The Donut his
recipes and lore from Boston to Berlin
suffice to say carinal is what you call
a donut expert when you have something
so Central to a culture as a donut is to
American culture you want to tell
stories around it and we hear a gpic
story are no
exception first part of our story takes
us to 1916 where a Boston Post reporter
interviewed Hansen Crockett Gregory
Gregory gives this long interview where
he explains how he invented it which was
that he was on board ship when he was
around 15 years old but he had the
clever idea of poking out the middle so
that the whole thing would cook evenly
this he claims made him the Columbus of
the dut
ho Gregory's story spread like wildfire
the story was picked up by newspapers
all over the country this made him a
star it was a little unclear why they
believed the story of an 85-year-old
sailor um given the reputation Sailors
have skepticism aside Donuts grew more
and more popular over the years doing
large part to a donut dunking fat donut
dunking becomes a national Obsession in
1941 the national dunking association
yes a real thing hosted the Great donut
debate where the question was who put
the hole in the
donut and one side of the debate was The
Proposal that uh Captain Gregory had in
fact invented the dut hole as he had
explained which is as a youth on the
ship and on the other side Chief High
eagle of the tribe Chief High eag
had a completely different story many
generations ago a member of his tribe
was
pursuing a settler and this settler
apparently had a dut in her hand and
this young Indian brave shot an arrow
which created a hole right in the middle
of the donut in the end the celebrity
panel awarded Gregory with the
Innovation and though we can never prove
that Hansen cck at Gregory put the first
hole in the donut the tail lives on
